market.summary: Global art market rebounded in 2025 with $59.6B in sales. U.S. auction sales rose 23% to $3.17B. Shift towards blue-chip artists and Impressionist/Modern segments.
keyTrends: West U.S. accounts for 35% of purchases

highlights: Vivian Maier prints (206) at auction until March 26 (est. $1-1.5M)
25th Biennale of Sydney ('Rememory') running until June 14
Shahzia Sikander's '3 to 12 Nautical Miles' at M+ Hong Kong
